perturbation.original_text: Sabco shall provide unto Prolong five aggregate ------------------ driver appearances (2) two-hours each at no fee. Prolong shall be responsible for all first class travel expenses relating to each driver appearance, i.e. hotel, airfare, meals, etc. Additional appearances by Sabco drivers shall be at the discounted rate of [ * ] ($[ * ]) Dollars per day per driver, [ * ]. Sabco shall further provide the services of each driver for one free day for commercial use (up to six hours each) for still photo shoot, TV and radio/commercial production. Prolong shall be responsible for all first class travel expenses relating to each driver appearance, i.e. hotel, airfare, meals, etc.
perturbation.changed_text: Sabco shall provide unto Prolong five aggregate ------------------ driver appearances (2) two-hours each at no fee, provided that such appearances are scheduled at least 60 days in advance and are subject to driver availability. Prolong shall be responsible for all first class travel expenses relating to each driver appearance, i.e. hotel, airfare, meals, etc. Additional appearances by Sabco drivers shall be at the standard rate of [ * ] ($[ * ]) Dollars per day per driver, [ * ]. Sabco shall further provide the services of each driver for one free day for commercial use (up to six hours each) for still photo shoot, TV and radio/commercial production, which must be scheduled at least 90 days in advance and is subject to driver approval. Prolong shall be responsible for all first class travel expenses relating to each driver appearance, i.e. hotel, airfare, meals, etc.
perturbation.explanation: The original text stated that Sabco shall provide five driver appearances with no fee, with the only obligation of Prolong being to cover travel expenses. The changed text adds conditions regarding scheduling and driver availability for the initial five appearances and replaces 'discounted rate' with a 'standard rate' for additional appearances and subjects the free commercial day to driver approval. This introduces uncertainty and an in-text contradiction because Section 3 later mentions all drivers shall allow their likeness for Prolong at no additional costs, during the term of this agreement. This change affects the enforcement of the appearances, creating ambiguity on the cost/availability.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All Sabco drivers, while under contract with Team SABCO, shall allow their likeness, voice, picture and signature to be used for commercial purposes endorsing Prolong at no additional costs during the term of this agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces conditions on the driver appearances ('scheduled at least 60 days in advance and are subject to driver availability' and 'must be scheduled at least 90 days in advance and is subject to driver approval'). This directly contradicts the contradicted text stating that all Sabco drivers shall allow their likeness etc. to be used for commercial purposes at no additional costs during the term of this agreement. The new scheduling and approval requirements effectively add a condition that could incur additional costs or prevent Prolong from using the drivers' likeness as initially agreed. Therefore, the change introduces a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Decal location. Sabco will designate Prolong as an associate sponsor --------------- on its No. 40, No. 42 and No. 46 Winston Cup race cars in the aforementioned 33 events. Sabco shall cause each car to be painted with paint schemes approved by each's primary sponsor and shall cause to display Prolong associate sponsor decal signage upon the middle side panel (between car number and rear tire; both sides of car) with dimensions of approximately 6 inches high by 16 inches long. In addition, Sabco shall provide, subject to Prolong's approval, drive, pit crew, team uniforms, team pit equipment, team race car transporter, show car and show car transporter bearing prominent Prolong associate sponsor identification as well as team pit equipment with size and placement commensurate with level of sponsorship
perturbation.changed_text: Decal location. Sabco will designate Prolong as an associate sponsor --------------- on its No. 40, No. 42 and No. 46 Winston Cup race cars in the aforementioned 33 events, if Prolong provides the decals at least 30 days before each race. Sabco shall cause each car to be painted with paint schemes approved by each's primary sponsor and shall use reasonable efforts to display Prolong associate sponsor decal signage upon the middle side panel (between car number and rear tire; both sides of car) with dimensions of approximately 6 inches high by 16 inches long. In addition, Sabco shall provide, subject to Prolong's approval and availability, drive, pit crew, team uniforms, team pit equipment, team race car transporter, show car and show car transporter bearing prominent Prolong associate sponsor identification as well as team pit equipment with size and placement commensurate with level of sponsorship
perturbation.explanation: The original agreement stated that Sabco would designate Prolong as an associate sponsor, and 'shall cause to display Prolong associate sponsor decal signage'. The modified version introduces a condition that Prolong must provide decals and that Sabco only needs to make 'reasonable efforts'. This creates an ambiguity as to who is responsible for decal production, and it is less forceful. Section 2 lists the services to be provided by Sabco, creating a potential contradiction, where the service could not be fully provided by Sabco. The terms 'subject to Prolong's approval' and 'subject to availability' could hinder Sabco's ability to fulfil their obligations under section 6, where Sabco is to use its best efforts to promote Prolong.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Media, Public Relations and Sponsor Communications. Sabco will use its -------------------------------------------------- best efforts to obtain favorable exposure for Prolong and will be available to assist Prolong with public relations activities to a reasonable extent. This shall include making members of Sabco available for media interviews, press conferences or other public relations activity, as reasonably requested by Prolong, at or near race sites on dates Sabco is at race sites pursuant to their obligations hereunder. Sabco shall provide at its expense a staff member to handle race team's media and public relations needs and shall cause Prolong to receive prominent mention and display within press kits featuring the Sabco No. 40, 42 and 46 race cars. In each of the 1998, 1999 and year-2000 races in which Prolong is designated as an associate sponsor, Sabco shall fax to Prolong officers on the Monday following the race, race results and a summary of the prior weekend activities. * CONFIDENTIAL PORTIONS OMITTED AND FILED SEPARATELY WITH THE COMMISSION.
perturbation.justification: The original text states Sabco 'shall cause to display Prolong associate sponsor decal signage', whereas the changed text weakens this obligation to 'shall use reasonable efforts to display Prolong associate sponsor decal signage' and introduces a condition that Prolong must provide the decals at least 30 days before each race. This contradicts the 'best efforts' clause in the contradicted text, as Sabco's best efforts are now contingent on Prolong providing the decals, and the 'reasonable efforts' clause gives Sabco leeway not to display the decals, regardless of their best efforts.

perturbation.original_text: Show Car. Sabco agrees to provide at no expense to Prolong for its use -------- in promoting its sponsorship, five (5) free show car appearance days whereas Prolong can deem which of the Sabco show cars to use. This shall mean that Prolong may schedule any combination of Sabco's three show cars (based on availability) not to exceed a total of five show days (travel days are considered a "show date"). Sabco will provide transportation of show car and will provide an attendant to stay with the car during its display period. For any show car appearance requested by Prolong over and above the five (5) free appearances, Sabco will make available unto Prolong a show car at a discounted rate of [ * ] Dollars ($ [ * ]) per day. All travel days to and from the site of a show car appearance, as well as the actual day upon which show car is on display will be charged as a "show date". It is further understood that the parties will agree in advance upon a schedule of places and events for the show car to be displayed at such times as will not interfere with Sabco's racing schedule.
perturbation.changed_text: Show Car. Sabco agrees to try to provide at no expense to Prolong for its use -------- in promoting its sponsorship, up to five (5) show car appearance days whereas Prolong can suggest which of the Sabco show cars to use, subject to Sabco's discretion. This shall mean that Prolong may request any combination of Sabco's three show cars (based on availability), with a maximum of five requested show days (travel days are considered a "show date"). Sabco will attempt to provide transportation of show car and attempt to provide an attendant to stay with the car during its display period. For any show car appearance requested by Prolong over and above the potential five (5) show car appearances, Sabco may make available unto Prolong a show car at a rate to be determined at that time. All travel days to and from the site of a show car appearance, as well as the actual day upon which show car is on display will be charged as a potential "show date". It is further understood that the parties will negotiate in good faith upon a schedule of places and events for the show car to be displayed at such times as will not interfere with Sabco's racing schedule.
perturbation.explanation: The original text stated that Sabco agrees to provide at no expense for five show car apperance days, and they will provide transportation of show car and an attendent. The modified text adds the terms try to, suggest, subject to sabco's discretion, attempt to, potential, and negotiation in good faith. This adds many points of ambiguity and uncertainty. Sabco's agreement has been weakened and the obligations have been softened to create an in-text contradiction regarding the delivery and commitment of the agreed sponsorship benefits. The uncertainty in the service to be provided by Sabco could potentially contradict with section 6, where Sabco is to use its best efforts to promote Prolong.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Media, Public Relations and Sponsor Communications. Sabco will use its -------------------------------------------------- best efforts to obtain favorable exposure for Prolong and will be available to assist Prolong with public relations activities to a reasonable extent. This shall include making members of Sabco available for media interviews, press conferences or other public relations activity, as reasonably requested by Prolong, at or near race sites on dates Sabco is at race sites pursuant to their obligations hereunder. Sabco shall provide at its expense a staff member to handle race team's media and public relations needs and shall cause Prolong to receive prominent mention and display within press kits featuring the Sabco No. 40, 42 and 46 race cars. In each of the 1998, 1999 and year-2000 races in which Prolong is designated as an associate sponsor, Sabco shall fax to Prolong officers on the Monday following the race, race results and a summary of the prior weekend activities. * CONFIDENTIAL PORTIONS OMITTED AND FILED SEPARATELY WITH THE COMMISSION.
perturbation.justification: The modified text introduces significant ambiguity and weakens Sabco's obligations regarding the show car appearances. Phrases like "try to provide," "suggest," "subject to Sabco's discretion," "attempt to," "potential," and "negotiate in good faith" create uncertainty about Sabco's commitment. This directly contradicts the original intent and the explicit obligation under Section 6, which requires Sabco to use its "best efforts" to promote Prolong. The shift from a firm agreement to an uncertain "attempt" to provide the service is a direct conflict.
